sentences.target: Ich besuche meine Schwester heute nach der Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bəˈzuːxə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ˈhɔʏ̯tə naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Ich besuche meine Schwester heute nach der Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bəˈzuːxə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ˈhɔʏ̯tə naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: I’m visiting my sister today after work.
translations.es: Hoy voy a ver a mi hermana después del trabajo.
translations.fr: Je vais voir ma sœur après le travail aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi vado a trovare mia sorella dopo il lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天下班后我要去看我妹妹。
translations.yue: 我今日放工後會去探我阿妹。
translations.ru: Я сегодня после работы зайду к сестре.
translations.pt: Hoje vou visitar minha irmã depois do trabalho.
translations.he: אני מבקר את אחותי היום אחרי העבודה.
translations.tr: Bugün işten sonra kız kardeşimi ziyaret edeceğim.
translations.vi: Hôm nay sau giờ làm tôi sẽ đến thăm em gái.
translations.nl: Ik ga vandaag na het werk mijn zus bezoeken.
translations.uk: Я сьогодні після роботи піду до сестри.
translations.hu: Ma munka után meglátogatom a lánytestvéremet.
translations.hi: मैं आज काम के बाद अपनी बहन से मिलने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj po pracy odwiedzę moją siostrę.
translations.el: Σήμερα μετά τη δουλειά θα επισκεφτώ την αδελφή μου.
translations.nb: Jeg skal besøke søsteren min i dag etter jobb.
translations.id: Hari ini setelah kerja saya akan mengunjungi saudara perempuan saya.
translations.sv: Jag ska besöka min syster efter jobbet idag.
translations.ro: Astăzi după serviciu o vizitez pe sora mea.
translations.cs: Dnes po práci navštívím svou sestru.
translations.da: Jeg besøger min søster i dag efter arbejde.
translations.fi: Menen tänään töiden jälkeen siskoni luo.
translations.ja: 今日は仕事のあと、妹に会いに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite lexical verb, present 1st person singular; main predicate selecting a direct (accusative) object.
Attributive possessive determiner agreeing with 'Schwester' (feminine singular accusative); marks possession by the speaker.
Common noun; direct object of 'besuche' (accusative singular).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the time of the action ('today').
Preposition governing the dative; heads the prepositional phrase 'nach der Arbeit' expressing temporal sequence ('after').
Definite article in dative feminine singular, required by the preposition 'nach'; modifies 'Arbeit'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase; object of 'nach' (dative singular).

sentences.target: Meine Schwester wohnt jetzt in Berlin.

translations.de: Meine Schwester wohnt jetzt in Berlin.
translations.en: My sister lives in Berlin now.
translations.es: Mi hermana vive en Berlín ahora.
translations.fr: Ma sœur habite à Berlin maintenant.
translations.it: Mia sorella vive a Berlino adesso.
translations.ru: Моя сестра теперь живёт в Берлине.
translations.pt: Minha irmã mora em Berlim agora.
translations.vi: Bây giờ em gái tôi sống ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn zus woont nu in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Моя сестра тепер живе в Берліні.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन अब बर्लिन में रहती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra teraz mieszka w Berlinie.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου τώρα μένει στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Min søster bor i Berlin nå.
translations.id: Sekarang saudara perempuan saya tinggal di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min syster bor i Berlin nu.
translations.ro: Acum sora mea locuiește în Berlin.
translations.cs: Moje sestra teď žije v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min søster bor i Berlin nu.
translations.ja: 今、妹はベルリンに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner agreeing with 'Schwester' (feminine singular nominative); marks possession.
Common noun; subject of the sentence (nominative singular).
Finite lexical verb, present 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'resides'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates current time ('now').
Preposition governing the dative when expressing static location; introduces the locative complement.
Proper noun; complement of the preposition 'in' indicating location (dative in a static sense).

sentences.target: Du kannst meine Schwester später anrufen.

translations.de: Du kannst meine Schwester später anrufen.
translations.en: You can call my sister later.
translations.es: Puedes llamar a mi hermana más tarde.
translations.fr: Tu peux appeler ma sœur plus tard.
translations.it: Puoi chiamare mia sorella più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以晚些时候给我妹妹打电话。
translations.yue: 你可以之後打畀我阿妹。
translations.ru: Ты можешь позже позвонить моей сестре.
translations.pt: Você pode ligar para minha irmã mais tarde.
translations.he: אתה יכול להתקשר לאחותי אחר כך.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gọi cho em gái tôi sau.
translations.nl: Je kunt mijn zus later bellen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш пізніше подзвонити моїй сестрі.
translations.hi: तुम मेरी बहन को बाद में फोन कर सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz zadzwonić do mojej siostry później.
translations.el: Μπορείς να πάρεις τηλέφωνο την αδελφή μου αργότερα.
translations.nb: Du kan ringe søsteren min senere.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menelepon saudara perempuan saya nanti.
translations.sv: Du kan ringa min syster senare.
translations.ro: Poți să o suni pe sora mea mai târziu.
translations.da: Du kan ringe til min søster senere.
translations.ja: あとで妹に電話してもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Modal auxiliary, present 2nd person singular; selects an infinitival verb ('anrufen').
Attributive possessive determiner agreeing with 'Schwester' (feminine singular accusative); marks possession.
Common noun; direct object of 'anrufen' (accusative singular).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates a later time.
Separable lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst'. Not split here due to infinitival form.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester mag Pizza mit Käse.

translations.de: Meine Schwester mag Pizza mit Käse.
translations.en: My sister likes pizza with cheese.
translations.es: A mi hermana le gusta la pizza con queso.
translations.fr: Ma sœur aime la pizza au fromage.
translations.it: A mia sorella piace la pizza al formaggio.
translations.ru: Моя сестра любит пиццу с сыром.
translations.pt: Minha irmã gosta de pizza com queijo.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi thích pizza phô mai.
translations.nl: Mijn zus houdt van pizza met kaas.
translations.uk: Моя сестра любить піцу з сиром.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem szereti a sajtos pizzát.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन को चीज़ वाला पिज़्ज़ा पसंद है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra lubi pizzę z serem.
translations.el: Στην αδελφή μου αρέσει η πίτσα με τυρί.
translations.nb: Søsteren min liker pizza med ost.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya suka pizza keju.
translations.sv: Min syster gillar pizza med ost.
translations.ro: Sorei mele îi place pizza cu brânză.
translations.cs: Moje sestra má ráda pizzu se sýrem.
translations.da: Min søster kan lide pizza med ost.
translations.ja: 妹はチーズのピザが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner agreeing with 'Schwester' (feminine singular nominative); marks possession.
Common noun; subject of the sentence (nominative singular).
Finite lexical verb, present 3rd person singular; transitive predicate selecting an accusative object.
Common noun; direct object of 'mag' (accusative singular).
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a comitative/instrumental-like PP ('with cheese').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative singular); denotes the ingredient.
